title: Fix coverage gaps for daemon and list formatting
description:
Goal: reach 100% coverage and keep spec parity.

Acceptance:
- New/updated Gherkin scenarios cover daemon main, daemon server/request handling, retry logic, and list formatting for parent dash.
- Python and Rust steps updated to match.
- python coverage reaches 100% and rust tests remain green.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Progress: updated daemon failure scenarios and steps in Python and Rust; made daemon CLI step use fake daemon; added non-connection error scenario; resolved ambiguous list format steps by moving formatting to list_format_steps and renaming show assertions to 'formatted output should contain text'. Pending: rerun python coverage/behave, cargo test, cargo clippy, spec parity, and address any failures.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Tests: python3 -m coverage run --source=taskulus -m behave; python3 -m coverage report -m (100%); python3 -m black --check python; python3 -m ruff check python; cargo test --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml; cargo fmt --check --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml; cargo clippy --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings; python3 tools/check_spec_parity.py.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Plan: fix Python coverage shortfall by removing try/except branches in issue color helpers. Add explicit color validation and normalize invalid/None to no color in issue_line.py and issue_display.py. Re-run black/ruff and tools/run_specs.py to confirm 100% coverage.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Update: added Unix listener in Rust daemon empty-response step to cover read_line empty response path; validated color normalization changes in Python. Tests: python3 -m black python/; python3 -m ruff check python/; cargo fmt --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml; python3 tools/run_specs.py (Python coverage 100%, Rust coverage 100%).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Additional checks: cargo fmt --check --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml; cargo clippy --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings; python3 tools/check_spec_parity.py.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Pushed commit 236d865 to main after bd sync. Unable to monitor GitHub Actions via gh because gh is not installed in this environment.
